snippet.title: Chelsea 2-0 Newcastle | Werner Bags Goal & Assist In Win! | Highlights
snippet.description:
Timo Werner scored and assisted in Chelsea's win at home to Newcastle. 

Download Chelsea FC's official mobile app:
-App Store https://apple.co/2vvlN9t
-Play Store http://bit.ly/2MfNJHX 

Subscribe: http://che.lc/YTsubscribe

To watch more EXCLUSIVE Chelsea content go to: http://che.lc/YTwebsite

Welcome to the official home of Chelsea Football Club on YouTube. It’s the only channel where you’ll get an authentic look at life at this great club. Every week we’ll be uploading fresh content from the training ground, our famous stadium and much, much more. Nowhere else will you get closer to world-class stars like Christian Pulisic, Kai Havertz, Hakim Ziyech, Timo Werner, N’Golo Kanté, Sam Kerr, Fran Kirby & Pernille Harder.

ABOUT CHELSEA FOOTBALL CLUB
Founded in 1905, Chelsea Football Club has a rich history, with its many successes including 5 Premier League titles, 8 FA Cups and 1 Champions League, secured on a memorable night in 2012. Famous former Blues include Peter Osgood, Gianfranco Zola, Frank Lampard, John Terry, Didier Drogba & Eden Hazard.

snippet.title: I will not leave the country to thieves, says President Uhuru Kenyatta
snippet.description:
President Uhuru Kenyatta now says he will not leave the country in the hands of thieves, as he exits the stage next year. Though it is not very clear on who he was referring to, president Kenyatta noted he would work hard, to make sure the country is in safe hands.

snippet.title: Nadia Mukami Ft Otile Brown - KOLO (Official Video) SMS SKIZA 5801644 TO 811
snippet.description:
#Nadia #Ngomma
SEVENS CREATIVE HUB  presents to you Nadia Mukami's 14th studio single and her 1st track off her upcoming Album. Nadia Mukami is an award winning female artist from Kenya and has fast been gaining global audience & popularity with her fluent swahili lyricism, mellow voice and soothing melodies. Nadia Mukami has been nominated at the MTV Awards under the category, Fanbase Award. 'KOLO' is an Afro- Pop classic banger recorded by Nadia Mukami and Otile Brown. 'KOLO' is a fun- social song that celebrates the African culture through its original sound, guitar and afro beats , with the lyrics honoring the Swahili culture which is vast spoken in Eastern Africa while appreciating the authenticity of the production. The song is basically a celebratory classic during happy occasions that praises both the African boy and girlchild in a metaphorical context and draws inspiration from them Mushrooms, a legendary late 90's band.

Executive Producer: Sevens Creative Hub
Audio Produced by: Vicky pon Dis
Written and performed by: Nadia Mukami & Otile Brown
Performed by: Nadia Mukami & Otile Brown
Video Directed by: Hanscana

For Bookings Contact:
0110020395/ 0733839198
nadiamukamibookings@gmail.com
sevenscreativehub@gmail.com







ALL COPYRIGHTS RESERVED WHETHER IN LYRICS, VISUALS , PERFORMANCE OR VOICE.

snippet.title: Anatenda - Gloria Muliro (Skiza 5960599 to 811)
snippet.description:
#ANATENDA.God indeed restores and makes all things beautiful in His time. No matter how long it takes, His promises come to pass if we believe. So hold on to His promise, it’ll be fulfilled in His time.

"For I know the plans I have for you" declares the Lord. They are plans for good and not for disaster, to give you a future and a hope.." Jeremiah 29:11.   

Song written by Bella Muliro.
Audio: Masterlab Studios
Mixed and mastered by Teddy B
Video: Awakening Pictures 

Who is Gloria Muliro?
Gloria Muliro is an award winning Kenyan Gospel Artist who was born and raised in Emuhaya Western part of Kenya. Read more here: https://gloriamuliro.com

How do I Connect with Gloria Muliro?

Website:              https://gloriamuliro.com
Facebook:           https://www.facebook.com/gloriaomuliro/                                                    
Instagram:          https://www.instagram.com/gloriamuliro/                                                    
Twitter:                https://twitter.com/gloriamuliroke

How do I Get Gloria Muliro Music?    
                                                                                                                                         
http://gloriamuliro.com

How do you Book for Gloria Muliro?

P. O BOX: 10655-00100  
As for all Media Interviews, Partnerships, Commercials, Appointments, Events & Bookings, Please Call (+254) 734 907222. Or equally, send an email to info@gloriamuliro.com/ admin@gloriamuliro.com.  

Thank you for visiting the official #GloriaMuliroMuzik YouTube Channel. I hope you enjoyed watching all her previous, latest and even her #NewGospel #MusicVideos. Don't forget to subscribe to this channel for more upcoming music as you help her spread the word to your friends by sharing any of the video links you loved.

#GloriaMuliro#Anatenda #NgommaGospel


 ©2021 channel administered by ngomma vas

snippet.title: Ala-C - Mundu Tawe ft Desagu X DJ Fatxo X Wandahuhu X Alex Mathenge (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Ala-C - Mundu Tawe ft Desagu X DJ Fatxo X Wandahuhu X Alex Mathenge & Sherlyne Anyango!
Audio Produced By BENJAH BEATS/Calif Records: +254720961312
Video Directed By Ricky Bekko.
Mundu Tawe is a feel good song, Video starring Desagu, Dj Fatxo, Wandahuhu & Alex Mathenge.
In the song, Ala-C talks about this girl who is said to have "dated" almost everyone. He mentions Samidoh, 90k Ka Mso, Dj Fatxo, Gachathi Wathuo, Jose Gatutura, Jeff Kuria, Kuruga, Gathee Wa Njeri, Gathenge, Katempa & Mike Rua.
Ala-C wants this girl badly but if rejected he tells us of his plans of proposing to Kareh B, Wakirumba, Sarafina Salim, Joyce Wa Mama, Nyoxx Wa Katta, Mzima Mzima & Shiro Wa Gp.
Check out The Video, leave a comment & Share

snippet.title: This Love Ya Wahu (Official Video) Sms Skiza 7301622 to 811
snippet.description:
This Love Ya Wahu is a song that appreciates the beauty and joys of a relationship which elevates her wisdom in love. The song is part of a unique project that brings together Wahu and her husband Nameless on a riddim talking about the two extremes of love: from the rosy and happy  to the rough and hard times (expressed in This love ya Nameless) 

The two videos story lines creatively intertwine with each other as the artist  express the two extremes of love. Watch and enjoy Wahu's version ;-)
 
Concept & Vision - Nameless & Wahu
Lyrics Written by Wahu & Brandon Israel
Music Performed by Wahu
Music Directed & Produced by Cedric “CEDO” Kadenyi 
Recorded by Dennis “DENNO” Papa
Mixed & Mastered by Lucas

snippet.title: This Love Ya Nameless (Official Video)  Sms Skiza 7301621 to 811
snippet.description:
This Love Ya Nameless is a song about the hardships that relationships go through, and the hurt and pain one experiences as a result. Ultimately these hard times make him grow wiser in love and life
 
The song is part of a unique project that brings together Nameless and his wife Wahu on a riddim talking about the two extremes of love: difficult moments to the rosy and happy (Expressed in This Love Ya Wahu ) 

The two videos story lines creatively intertwine with each other as the artist  express the two extremes of love. Watch and enjoy Nameless  version! 
 
Concept & Vision - Nameless & Wahu
Lyrics Written by Wahu & Brandon Israel
Music Performed by Wahu
Music Directed & Produced by Cedric “CEDO” Kadenyi 
Recorded by Dennis “DENNO” Papa
Mixed & Mastered by Lucas

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | MAN CITY 3-0 SPURS

snippet.title: Nandy Featuring Koffi Olomide - Leo Leo
snippet.description:
Nandy is a top Tanzanian female artist. She was selected to represent Coke Studio Africa 2017, where she did a remarkable performance with the Ethiopian Betty G and though a new comer at Coke Studio, got an opportunity to be upgraded to the high profile artists.
Nandy in November made Tanzania proud after being nominated and winning the Best Female on the East Africa category in the all Africa Music Awards (AFRIMMA). This was the first major award for this upcoming artist.
This opened up doors for her National recognition and Corporate Endoresment by signing for products by TradeKings, ENLAIR POPS and also signing as an Ambassador alongside Aslay for the National Sanitation and Hygiene campaign ( USICHUKULIE POA, NYUMBA NI CHOO)
She has currently the Number 1 song on Clouds FM for Four weeks in a row  for her hit song Kivuruge and hopefully will get the recognition that all artists strive for “JIWE LA MWEZI” that is awarded for songs that have surpassed a Million viewers on YOU TUBE but have held the charts the longest.


Connect with on
https://www.instagram.com/officialnandy/
https://twitter.com/officialnandy
https://www.facebook.com/officialnandy/
#Nandy #LeoLeo #Ngomma

snippet.title: Everton 0-2 Fulham | Premier League Highlights | Josh Maja at the double on Merseyside
snippet.description:
Watch the key moments from Goodison Park as Fulham faced Everton on Valentine's Day in the Premier League looking to secure their first league win at the ground.

Enjoy match highlights, player reactions, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Aleksandar Mitrović, Alphonse Areola, Ruben Loftus-Cheek, Kenny Tete, Antonee Robinson, Frank Anguissa and many more.

Subscribe to the Official Fulham YouTube Channel: http://ow.ly/e7Li30rhHTM

Fulham Football Club is London's oldest professional football club, having been established in 1879.

snippet.title: Raila ejects Governors Obado and Rasanga from podium in Kisumu
snippet.description:
Migori and Siaya counties’ governors, Okoth Obado and Cornel Rasanga, were on Monday denied the chance to share the podium with Raila Odinga at an event held at Ciala Resort in Kisumu County.

The duo arrived late at the meeting chaired by Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) leader Raila and headed straight for the podium where other governors were seated.

localized.description:

snippet.title: Watch NASA’s Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA’s Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

Today we enjoy  forgiveness to a point of making it our RIGHT...
this wouldn't be possible if and only if CHRIST was not born to the human race...
yet i will praise you Jesus Christ for teaching the world mercy and going all out to show it to all humans whether they acknowledge it or not, you don't plan to revoke it from us.
 As we all enjoy mercy and abundant room for appeal  may Christ receive his glorious praises from my heart.
You are welcome friends to praise with me as you subcribe .

snippet.title: WITCH BIRD (Mark Angel Comedy) (Episode 300)
snippet.description:
WITCH BIRD (Mark Angel Comedy) (Episode 300)

This is a documentary about the Mark Angel Family, So we just hit episode 300 on Mark Angel Comedy! 

This has got us so excited looking at how far we have gone in putting smiles on the faces of people so we decided that showing you all the real life of the Mark Angel Family would be a great, gratifying, and exciting idea, and here we are!

In this video, you will learn about everything you need to know about the Mark Angel Family, from what they eat to where they live and how they live! 

So sit back and relax and enjoy, and when you are done watching, do not forget to leave a comment about what you think of the life of the Mark Angel Family and also share the video with your family and friends so they could also watch, enjoy and share their takes.


Please don't forget to subscribe to Mark Angel Comedy Official YouTube Channel and turn on NOTIFICATION:
http://goo.gl/gnzgW3
http://www.youtube.com/MarkAngelComedy
GOD BLESS YOU, WE LOVE YOU. Enjoy!

snippet.title: Tessica Brown’s Gorilla Glue Hair Nightmare Fixed by Surgeon
snippet.description: Tessica Brown earned national notoriety for coating her hair with Gorilla Glue spray after running out of hairspray. She tried washing it out with oils and shampoo and even went to the emergency room, but nothing worked. Her pleas for help went viral on TikTok. That’s when Beverly Hills plastic surgeon Dr. Michael Obeng stepped in to help. Brown flew from her home in Louisiana to Los Angeles, where she underwent a procedure to dissolve the glue under light anesthesia.
tags: woman with gorilla glue in hair

localized.title: Tessica Brown’s Gorilla Glue Hair Nightmare Fixed by Surgeon
localized.description: Tessica Brown earned national notoriety for coating her hair with Gorilla Glue spray after running out of hairspray. She tried washing it out with oils and shampoo and even went to the emergency room, but nothing worked. Her pleas for help went viral on TikTok. That’s when Beverly Hills plastic surgeon Dr. Michael Obeng stepped in to help. Brown flew from her home in Louisiana to Los Angeles, where she underwent a procedure to dissolve the glue under light anesthesia.

snippet.title: DP Ruto, Gideon Moi rivalry plays out at Hosea Kiplagat’s burial
snippet.description: Deputy President William Ruto came head to head with his political nemesis Gideon Moi amid their heightening rivalry in the rift valley. The DP and the Baringo senator met at the funeral of former KANU stalwart Hosea Kiplagat. And as Sam Ogina reports, the DP and Baringo senator locked horns over development projects in the area with each one taking credit for them.

hi.title: सफलता में स्कूल - फेंकना वापस सोमवार (निशान देवदूत कॉमेडी)
hi.description:
सफलता में स्कूल - फेंकना वापस सोमवार चाची सफलता हो जाता है उसके चाचा तथा सब उसके शिक्षकों की हक्का - बक्का रह जाना साथ से उसके अलौकिक बर्बर जवाब तथा बुद्धि पर इस एपिसोड का निशान देवदूत कॉमेडी झुका हुआ, सफलता में स्कूल। अगर आप प है गया धृष्टता करना उस चाची सफलता है  रानी का बर्बर जवाब में है सब का  कॉमेडी मनोरंजन, इस वीडियो यहां मर्जी बनाना आप प सोच फिर तथा आप प मर्जी निश्चित रूप से है नहीं न कारणों सेवा मेरे संदेह करना उसके शीर्षक रानी बचत जवाब उपरांत देख रहे उसके बनाना उसके चाचा, तिरछी नजर तथा शिक्षकों की में है स्कूल सवाल जो अपने बुद्धि स्तर।

कृप्या नहीं है भूल जाओ सेवा मेरे सदस्यता लेने के सेवा मेरे निशान देवदूत कॉमेडी आधिकारिक यूट्यूब चैनल तथा मोड़ पर अधिसूचना:
http://goo.gl/gnzgW3
http://www.youtube.com/MarkAngelComedy
परमेश्वर आशीर्वाद देना आप प, हम माही माही आप। का आनंद लें!


#सफलता #successinschool #Emanuella #AuntySuccess #सफलता # डेनिलसन आइग्वे # निगरियन कॉमेडी # नाइजीरियाई कॉमेडी 2019 # शुकवुमेका #MentaMusic

snippet.title: I was cooking for my husband's side chick and I had no idea - Rose Williams | Tuko Talks | Tuko TV
snippet.description:
Rose never thought her husband of seven years would one day show up with one of their employees to their house, have her make delicious dinner, then later on tell her he wanted the employee for a second wife.
I mean, she thought the girl was visiting them as a friend but all this time, she was cooking and entertaining her co wife.
Rose says there is no way in life she will ever accept a co wife but her ex husband comes from a region where a man can have as many wives as possible
The mother of two says after she refused her husbands offer, he went ahead and settled with the employee leaving them with nothing. She also adds that what hurts her most us the fact she always thought she was enough for him
She sat down with Lynn Ngugi for this exclusive episode of Tuko Talks

snippet.title: My sister stole my husband and I have forgiven her - Lilian Migwi | Tuko Talks | Tuko TV
snippet.description:
Lilian Migwi lost her husband of seven years to her younger sister but that does not hurt her anymore. The mother of two says she has forgiven both her husband and sister and wishes them well in their future together.
Her sister who now has a child with Lilian's ex husband does not regret her decision  to steal someone's husband and maintains she will keep him for good
Here is Lynn Ngugi with this exclusive episode episode of Tuko Talks

snippet.title: Bayern Munich v Tigres UANL | FIFA Club World Cup Qatar 2020 Final | Match Highlights
snippet.description:
Benjamin Pavard’s second-half goal proved the difference as UEFA Champions League winners Bayern Munich won the FIFA Club World Cup Qatar 2020 after a victory against Mexico’s Tigres UANL. FC Bayern’s world title triumph makes it a clean sweep of six trophies for the German giants, emulating the achievement of Barcelona in 2009/10.

snippet.title: Kenya's 'Spy Queen', Private Detective Jane Mugo - BBC Africa Eye documentary
snippet.description:
Kenya has a real version of the spy James Bond, and her name is Jane. Detective Jane Mugo is the country’s most famous and controversial private investigator. She says she’s solved hundreds of crimes, but some say she writes her own rules. This is the inside story of the woman they call Kenya’s 'Spy Queen.'

BBC Africa’s Sharon Machira has been investigating.

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32’ to tie at one and added two more in the 65’ and 85’. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70’ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27’ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

Goals from Phil Foden, Riyad Mahrez and Bernardo Silva sealed victory at Goodison Park with Pep Guardiola’s side becoming the first English side to record 10 consecutive top-flight league wins at the start of a year.

To watch a full 90-minute replay of the game, visit: https://www.mancity.com/citytv/city-plus

About the Official Man City YouTube Channel:

Get closer to the likes of Sergio Aguero, Kevin De Bruyne, Gabriel Jesus, Raheem Sterling, Riyad Mahrez, Benjamin Mendy and the rest of Pep Guardiola's team.

snippet.title: Jux - Mapepe (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Tanzanian R&B king Juma Jux premieres the new music video for his new hit single from his upcoming new Album which is untitled yet.“MAPEPE”., The enchanting music video was directed by Director Ivan. The track produced byTanzanian’s best producer S2Kizzy and it is the famous Tanzanian R&B king 2nd project for 2021. TheR&B song is a bounce track which is composed with a taste and sound from Salsa and Caribbean Flavorinfused together. The sound is very catchy and dance able, It explains a beautiful girl who showsuncertainty of her love from her partner and the lyrics prove that it was a man’s dream to be his partnerso the lady should stop her habit of uncertainty. She ought to relax enjoy being loved and reduce herefears and doubt. The video shows a lot of style in it plus scenarios from late years of 1980’s mixed withsome modern taste of fashion 

Available to download / stream: http://africori.to/mapepe.oyd


THE LOVE ALBUM is out now.
http://africori.to/juxthelovealbum.oyd 

© 2021 African BOY

Follow Jux 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Juma-Jux-553
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/juma_jux/

snippet.title: The difference between Thomas Tuchel's Chelsea and Frank Lampard's | ESPN FC
snippet.description:
Is it the new-manager bounce or the luxury of a favourable schedule? Either way, Chelsea are enjoying a five-match unbeaten run in the Premier League since Thomas Tuchel's appointment, including Monday's 2-0 win over Newcastle United, during which Timo Werner ended an EPL goal drought of more than 1,000 minutes. ESPN FC's Frank Lebouef, Steve Nicol and Don Hutchison break down the victory at Stamford Bridge and examine how Tuchel has changed the team since replacing Frank Lampard. Plus, the guys react to Werner's long-awaited goal and the absence of big-money players like Kai Havertz and Christian Pulisic.

#ESPNFC #PremierLeague #Chelsea #ThomasTuchel

Subscribe to ESPN UK: http://bit.ly/1oGUzVA

snippet.title: Muthama angered by Kalonzo’s remarks over his ex-wife Kavindu
snippet.description: Former Machakos senator Johnstone Muthama almost engaged wiper leader Kalonzo Musyoka in a fist fight at the funeral of Bishop Bernard Nguyo held in Kathiyani, Machakos County. Muthama had to be restrained by Machakos town member of Parliament Victor Munyaka after he charged towards Kalonzo after the wiper leader promised to reconcile Muthama and his ex-wife Agnes Kavindu who is vying for the Machakos senatorial seat. Kalonzo also claimed that the former senator will soon abandon the tanga tanga troupe and join him to work together.

snippet.title: Wodemaya And Miss Trudy 2Year Anniversery In Nigeria! /Memories Of Ethiopia!
snippet.description:
#Wodemaya #MissTrudy #Africatotheworld

snippet.title: DOELPUNTRIJKE SLOTFASE! 😱 | Leicester City vs Liverpool | Premier League 2020/21 | Samenvatting
snippet.description:
Goals en highlights van Leicester City FC - Liverpool FC gespeeld in de Premier League op 13/02/2021. Bekijk alle doelpunten en hoogtepunten in de samenvatting van deze Engelse competitiewedstrijd. ⇨ Abonneer je nu op het YouTube kanaal van Ziggo Sport voor meer video's ⇨ http://bit.ly/2Q03IYg

Landskampioen Liverpool dat met maar liefst 18 punten voorsprong kampioen is geworden is the one to beat dit seizoen! Na dertig jaar wist Liverpool eindelijk weer de titel te pakken. Kunnen zij de titel ook dit jaar binnen halen? Of wordt het toch Manchester City, Manchester United of Chelsea met o.a. Hakim Ziyech? En hoe vergaat het Donny van der Beek bij zijn nieuwe club Manchester United?

De Premier League is dit seizoen spannender dan ooit! Volg het ook dit jaar weer allemaal live bij Ziggo Sport op kanaal 14!

snippet.title: Lady P and the Sex Work Sisterhood - BBC Africa Eye documentary
snippet.description:
Africa Eye investigates an unsolved murder of a sex worker in Sierra Leone and uncovers a world where women who sell sex are often abused, attacked, trafficked, and even killed.
 
In the city of Makeni, a group of sex workers, led by a woman called Lady P, are on a mission to fight for justice and to improve their rights. Although sex work is not illegal in the country, these women are seen as immoral outcasts and receive little support from the government or society. And as Tyson Conteh reports, their survival has been made even more precarious since the coronavirus pandemic.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/subscribetoafrica
Website: https://www.bbc.com/africa
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/bbcnewsafrica/
Twitter: https://www.twitter.com/bbcafrica/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/bbcafrica/

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman’s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

snippet.title: Tessica Brown Tears Up After Surgery to Remove Gorilla Glue From Her Hair
snippet.description:
Tessica Brown, who went viral after using Gorilla Glue as hairspray, flew to Los Angeles, where plastic surgeon Dr. Michael Obeng removed the glue free of charge. The 40-year-old mom of five gets emotional after the procedure, running her fingers through her freed hair for the first time in weeks.

Exclusives from #ETonline :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLQwITQ__CeH2Y_7g2xeiNDa0vQsROQQgv

snippet.title: Al Ahly v Palmeiras | FIFA Club World Cup Qatar 2020 | Match Highlights
snippet.description:
CAF Champions League kings Al Ahly SC recorded a penalty shoot-out win over Copa Libertadores winners SE Palmeiras in the FIFA Club World Cup Qatar 2020 match for third place. Mohamed El Shenaway saved two penalties in the shootout as the Egyptian side marked their best finish at the Club World Cup since 2006.

snippet.title: Impala Escapes Crocodile Only To Get Caught by Leopard!
snippet.description:
In this remarkable sighting, we see a young, unfortunate impala really have all the odds stacked against it. This impala got caught by a crocodile, and showed immense strength and determination to defeat the croc, but, seconds later, it then faces a much more difficult opponent – a hungry Leopard.
BOOK YOUR TRIP TO KRUGER: http://bit.ly/BookatKruger

This unbelievable sequence of events was filmed by doctor and banker, Angela and Craig Weeks, on their most recent trip to the Kruger National Park, a few weeks back.
Send in your wildlife video here, and earn money: https://www.latestsightings.com/partnership


Angela and Craig tell LatestSightings.com the story: “We were watching a herd of impala drinking at a large muddy pond that had formed next to the road after recent heavy rains near Biyamiti Weir. 
We had stopped to take a closer look at one impala that had a broken leg. Suddenly a 4-foot crocodile shot out of the water and grabbed a young impala, dragging it into the muddy water and submerging it.”

“A struggle ensued for about 2 minutes, but the impala was able to break free and jump out of the water. The impala herd had been alarm calling really loudly during the impala-crocodile struggle, which is basically a call for food for any predator in the area, as something most likely has just been caught. This time, a nearby Leopard heard the alarm calls and came to see if it meant a free meal for it.
The Leopard spots the impala in the water and doesn’t have to wait long. As the unlucky impala escaped the croc, it was ambushed and caught by the leopard.”

“We were shocked by the unexpected impala takedown and really surprised that a crocodile was lurking in such a small mud pool. When the impala eventually escaped the croc, we were relieved but seconds later totally surprised by the leopard’s stealth ambush. It was an unforgettable sighting and a “once-in-a-lifetime” experience for us.”

“After all the commotion, the leopard proceeded to consume the impala in the shade of a nearby fallen tree. We were able to watch this sighting with our 2 boys, 8 and 11, and their grandpa” 

To license the footage: 
Contact@LatestSightings.com

Get some of our exclusive specials at the Kruger National Park (Free nights): 
https://www.latestsightings.com/specials

Snapchat: LatestSightings
Twitter & Instagram: @LatestKruger

For live wildlife sightings in the Kruger National Park: http://www.latestsightings.com/

And like our Facebook page for great sightings and photos: https://www.facebook.com/latestsightingskruger

Subscribe to us on YouTube: http://www.youtube.com/LatestSightings

snippet.title: UWEZO WA AJABU, MTU MZIMA ANAYEONGEA SAUTI YA KITOTO "PEPO HILO SHINDWA, WEWE JINI MTOTO"
snippet.description:
Kutana na Kijana Leward Mponda ambaye ana kipaji cha kubadilisha sauti yake ya utu uzima na kuongea kama mtoto mdogo, tumepiga nae stori ili kukifahamu kipaji chake.

Mponda anasema aligundua uwezo wake wakati alipoona Watoto wanakula pilau nae akataka kula ili kujichanganya akajikuta anongea kama mtoto "Nilikua kwa Bibi nachunga ng'ombe nikarudi kutoka kuchunga ng'ombe nikakuta Watoto wanakula pilau, nikawaambia watoto na mimi naomba kula pilau na nyie, watoto walikimbia kisa sauti yangu niliyobadilisha, pilau ilinifanya nijaribu kuongea kama wao ili nile ila nikajikuta napatia"

snippet.title: EVERTON 5-4 TOTTENHAM | EXTENDED FA CUP HIGHLIGHTS
snippet.description:
An incredible FA Cup tie ended with a 5-4 victory to Everton after extra time against Tottenham. The Blues are through to the quarter-finals after goals from Dominic Calvert-Lewin, Richarlison (2), Sigurdsson and Bernard.
